svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: Multi-server orchestration: one agent fans out across 3 MCP servers (web · knowledge · geo) to research a destination, then synthesizes a day-by-day plan.

g.text: Agent factory — TWO agents share the same tools (A/B comparison)
# /plan accepts agent_type ∈ {"cuga", "react"} → same tools, two reasoning loops

svg.text: REQUEST FLOW — POST /plan {destination: "Kyoto", days: 5, travel_month: "October", interests: ["historic","food"], agent_type: "cuga"}

g.text: Why this matters — multi-server orchestration without per-app glue
→ LLM picks the right tool per step.
